heading: Scholarships for qualified elementary or secondary education expenses of eligible students
label: 139K Scholarships for qualified elementary or secondary education expenses of eligible students
notes: Delayed Effective Date of SectionFor delayed effective date of section, see Effective Date note below.

Effective DateSection applicable to amounts received after , in taxable years ending after such date, see , set out in an Effective Date of 2025 Amendment note under .Dec. 31, 2026section 70411(c)(2) of Pub. L. 119–21section 25 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection applicable to amounts received after , in taxable years ending after such date, see , set out in an Effective Date of 2025 Amendment note under .Dec. 31, 2026section 70411(c)(2) of Pub. L. 119–21section 25 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In the case of an individual, gross income shall not include any amounts provided to such individual or any dependent of such individual pursuant to a scholarship for qualified elementary or secondary education expenses of an eligible student which is provided by a scholarship granting organization.

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: b Definitions
children.text: In this section, the terms “qualified elementary or secondary education expense”, “eligible student”, and “scholarship granting organization” have the same meaning given such terms under section 25F(c).
